The Beehive.title: Austin McMahon Group
The Beehive.synopsis: An expressive and expressionistic musician, drummer/composer Austin McMahon has put together an expert and deep group of jazz players. This is an exciting and beautiful band. Expect a unique approach and creative and evocative compositions.
